```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
     ggtitle("% difference of predicted bp counts from actual expected genome size")

print(gg)

gg <- ggplot(df[df$sp != "Yeast",], aes( PERCENTdiff_from_actual*100 ) )+geom_histogram(aes(fill =sp ), alpha = 0.4)+
     theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust)+
  #theme(legend.position = "none")+
     ggtitle("% difference of predicted bp counts from actual expected genome size, no Yeast")

print(gg)

gg <- ggplot(df[df$sp != "Yeast",], aes(sp, PERCENTdiff_from_actual*100 ) )+geom_violin()+geom_point(aes(colour =file_prefix ), alpha = 0.1)+
     theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust)+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
     ggtitle("% difference of predicted bp counts from actual expected genome size, no Yeast")

print(gg)



```

### corresponding plots 

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

plotlist <- list()
for(sp in unique(toplot$sp) ){

  df <- toplot[toplot$sp == sp,]
  #
    #df <- df[df$ploidy_clust == "1n",]
    actual_pos <- unique(df$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df$validation == "ACTUAL"])
  
    df <- df[df$if_test_sp == "TEST_bootstrap",]
df <- df[!is.na(df$sp) & !is.na(df$suns_for_clust),]
   gg <- ggplot(df, aes( bp_exp_ploidy_corr ) )+geom_histogram(aes(fill = ploidy_clust), bins = 30, alpha = 0.4, position = "identity")+
     theme_bw()+geom_vline( aes(xintercept = actual_pos[1]) )+ geom_vline( aes(xintercept = actual_pos[2]) )+
    scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2", labels = scales::math_format(2^.x, format = log2), breaks = 2^(19:40))+facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust)+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
     ggtitle(sp)
  
print(gg)
  plotlist[[length(plotlist) + 1]] <- gg
 
}

#type of visualisation that might be interesting but not reallly essential - uncomment if needed
#plotlist <- list()
#for(sp in unique(toplot$sp) ){
#  df <- toplot[toplot$sp == sp,]
#    actual_pos <- unique(df$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df$validation == "ACTUAL"])
#    df <- df[df$if_test_sp == "TEST_bootstrap",]
#   gg <- ggplot(df, aes( diff_from_actual ) )+geom_histogram(aes(fill = validation), alpha = 0.4, position = "identity")+
#     theme_bw()+geom_vline( aes(xintercept = actual_pos[1]) )+ geom_vline( aes(xintercept = actual_pos[2]) )+
#    scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2", labels = scales::math_format(2^.x, format = log2), breaks = 2^(19:40))+facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust)+
#  theme(legend.position = "none")+
#     ggtitle(sp)
#print(gg)
# plotlist <- list(plotlist, gg)
#}

#unique(toplot$ploidy_clust)

#

```


## PLOTS FOR MANUSCRIPT


```{r}

plotlist <- list()
for(sp in unique(toplot$beatiful_sp) ){

  df <- toplot[toplot$beatiful_sp == sp,]
  #
    #df <- df[df$ploidy_clust == "1n",]
    actual_pos <- unique(df$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df$validation == "ACTUAL"])
  
    df <- df[df$if_test_sp == "TEST_bootstrap",]
df <- df[!is.na(df$sp) & !is.na(df$beatiful_suns),]


   gg <- ggplot(df, aes( bp_exp_ploidy_corr ) )+geom_histogram(aes(fill = ploidy_clust), bins = 30, alpha = 0.4, position = "identity")+
     theme_bw()+    scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2", labels = scales::math_format(2^.x, format = log2))+
     geom_vline(xintercept = actual_pos[1])+
     geom_vline(xintercept = actual_pos[2])+
     facet_wrap(~beatiful_suns)+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
     xlab("predicted genome size, bp")+ylab("number of cells")+
     ggtitle(sp)
  
#print(gg)
  plotlist[[length(plotlist) + 1]] <- gg
 
}


ggexport(plotlist = plotlist, filename = "distribution_colntrols_suppl.pdf", ncol = 1, height = 20)

```



```{r}

plotlist <- list()
for(sp in unique(toplot$beatiful_sp) ){

  df <- toplot[toplot$beatiful_sp == sp,]

  df <- df[df$suns_for_clust == "est_sp  ALL",]
  #
    #df <- df[df$ploidy_clust == "1n",]
    actual_pos <- unique(df$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df$validation == "ACTUAL"])
  
    df <- df[df$if_test_sp == "TEST_bootstrap",]
    
  #  df <- df[!is.na(df$sp) & !is.na(df$suns_for_clust),]

   gg <- ggplot(df, aes( bp_exp_ploidy_corr ) )+geom_histogram(aes(fill = ploidy_clust), bins = 30, alpha = 0.4, position = "identity")+
     theme_bw()+ scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2", labels = scales::math_format(2^.x, format = log2))+
     geom_vline(xintercept = actual_pos[1] )+ 
     geom_vline(xintercept = actual_pos[2] )+
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
     xlab("predicted genome size, bp")+ylab("number of cells")+
     ggtitle(sp)
  
#print(gg)

 plotlist[[length(plotlist) + 1]] <- gg

}


ggexport(plotlist = plotlist, filename = "distribution_colntrols_main.pdf", nrow = 2, ncol = 2)

```



```{r}


median_summary_control <- predictedbp_median_estimator(data.frame(toplot[toplot$suns_for_clust == "est_sp  ALL" & toplot$if_test_sp == "TEST_bootstrap",]), subset_for_median_estimation = "ploidy"  )
median_summary_control$sp <- str_replace(median_summary_control$sp, "nucl_df", "")

tmp <- toplot[toplot$validation == "ACTUAL", c("sp", "bp_exp_ploidy_corr", "ploidy_clust", "beatiful_sp")]
tmp <- tmp[!duplicated(tmp),]



median_summary_control_act <- median_summary_control %>% full_join(tmp) 

median_summary_control_act <- median_summary_control_act[median_summary_control_act$ploidy_clust != "Undefined",]
median_summary_control_act$ploidy_clust <- str_replace(median_summary_control_act$ploidy_clust, "1n", "G1")
median_summary_control_act$ploidy_clust <- str_replace(median_summary_control_act$ploidy_clust, "2n", "G2")

#adding means of medians for each species - so far, done because this is a way to obtain a single estimate of the genome size
median_summary_control_act <- median_summary_control_act %>% group_by(beatiful_sp, ploidy_clust) %>%  mutate(mean_MEDIAN_bp_exp = mean(MEDIAN_bp_exp, na.rm = TRUE))%>%ungroup()


gg_mainB <- ggplot(median_summary_control_act, aes(factor(beatiful_sp, 
                                              levels = c("Saccharomyces cerevisiae", "Capsaspora owczarzaki","Salpingoeca rosetta", "Diplonema papillatum" )), (MEDIAN_bp_exp-bp_exp_ploidy_corr)/bp_exp_ploidy_corr) )+
    #geom_boxplot(aes(fill = as.factor(exp_series_date)) )+#geom_point(alpha = 0.1)+
    geom_violin( ) +
   geom_point(alpha=0.25 ) +
     geom_point( aes( x=beatiful_sp, y = (mean_MEDIAN_bp_exp-bp_exp_ploidy_corr)/bp_exp_ploidy_corr ), colour = "coral2", shape =8, size=3 ) +

#   geom_pointrange( aes( 
#   ymin= (MEDIAN_bp_exp-as.numeric(mean_lower)-bp_exp_ploidy_corr)/bp_exp_ploidy_corr,
#  ymax= (MEDIAN_bp_exp+as.numeric(mean_higher)-bp_exp_ploidy_corr)/bp_exp_ploidy_corr ), 
#                 colour = "coral2", shape =8)+
 
  # geom_line( aes(group=exp_series_date), alpha=0.15)+
  facet_wrap(~ploidy_clust, scales = "free_y", ncol=1)+
     theme_bw()+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =45, hjust = 1))+
     ylab("difference of predicted median from actual genome size")+
     xlab("Control species predicted")



ggsave(gg_mainB, filename = "median_distr_controls_main.pdf")


```


```{r}
library(patchwork)


figA <- (plotlist[[3]] | plotlist[[1]]) /
        (plotlist[[4]] | plotlist[[2]])
gg_mainB <- gg_mainB + theme(plot.margin = unit(c(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.2), "cm"))

final_fig <- figA / gg_mainB +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.3, 1))  
  #plot_annotation(tag_levels = c("A", "B"))

ggsave("controls_main.pdf", final_fig,  height = 10)

```



```{r}

plotlist <- list()

for(suns in unique(toplot$suns_for_clust)){
  
suns1 <- str_replace(suns, "est_sp .* ", "ploidy")
suns1 <- str_replace(suns1, "NOT CLUSTERED ", "ploidy")

suns1 <- str_replace(suns1, "slide", "__slidedate")
suns1 <- str_replace(suns1, "series", "__exp_series_date")
suns1 <- str_replace(suns1, "ALL", "")
  
print(c(suns, suns1))

median_summary_control <- predictedbp_median_estimator(data.frame(toplot[toplot$suns_for_clust == suns & toplot$if_test_sp == "TEST_bootstrap",]), subset_for_median_estimation = suns1 , BS_replicates = 100  )
median_summary_control$sp <- str_replace(median_summary_control$sp, "nucl_df", "")

tmp <- toplot[toplot$validation == "ACTUAL", c("sp", "bp_exp_ploidy_corr", "ploidy_clust", "beatiful_sp")]
tmp <- tmp[!duplicated(tmp),]



median_summary_control_act <- median_summary_control %>% full_join(tmp) 
if(length(grep("NOT CLUSTERED", suns)) ==0) {
  median_summary_control_act <- median_summary_control_act[median_summary_control_act$ploidy_clust != "Undefined",] }
else {median_summary_control_act <- median_summary_control_act[median_summary_control_act$ploidy_clust == "Undefined",] }
median_summary_control_act$ploidy_clust <- str_replace(median_summary_control_act$ploidy_clust, "1n", "G1")
median_summary_control_act$ploidy_clust <- str_replace(median_summary_control_act$ploidy_clust, "2n", "G2")

#adding means of medians for each species - so far, done because this is a way to obtain a single estimate of the genome size
median_summary_control_act <- median_summary_control_act %>% group_by(beatiful_sp, ploidy_clust) %>%  mutate(mean_MEDIAN_bp_exp = mean(MEDIAN_bp_exp, na.rm = TRUE))%>%ungroup()


gg <- ggplot(median_summary_control_act, aes(factor(beatiful_sp, 
                                              levels = c("Saccharomyces cerevisiae" , "Capsaspora owczarzaki","Salpingoeca rosetta", "Diplonema papillatum" )), (MEDIAN_bp_exp-bp_exp_ploidy_corr)/bp_exp_ploidy_corr) )+
    #geom_boxplot(aes(fill = as.factor(exp_series_date)) )+#geom_point(alpha = 0.1)+
    geom_violin( ) +
   geom_point(alpha=0.25 ) +
     geom_point( aes( x=beatiful_sp, y = (mean_MEDIAN_bp_exp-bp_exp_ploidy_corr)/bp_exp_ploidy_corr ), colour = "red", shape =18, size=1 ) +
 # geom_line( aes(group=exp_series_date), alpha=0.15)+
  facet_wrap(~ploidy_clust, scales = "free_x")+
     theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =45, hjust = 1),
         axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 7))+
     ylab("predicted median VS actual genome size")+
     xlab("Control species predicted")+
  ggtitle(toplot$beatiful_suns[toplot$suns_for_clust == suns])+scale_y_continuous(trans = "asinh")

gg
  plotlist[[length(plotlist) + 1]] <- gg
 
}


ggexport(plotlist = plotlist, filename = "median_distr_controls_suppl.pdf", ncol = 4, nrow =ceiling(length(plotlist) / 3), height = 15, width = 9)

#for (i in length(plotlist)) {  print(plotlist[i])}

```









## KS and median tests comparing predicted counts for each slide WITHIN different regressions - "How consistent are the results of each regression method when applied to different datasets(=SLIDES)?"

modified here - KS-test now compares distributions of "1n" and "2n" clusters separately.
```{r, include=FALSE}
pval_summary_within <- ks_medians_estimator_within(toplot)
```




GENERATING INTERMEDIATE PLOTS - uncomment content of chunk below upon need

```{r}
#ks_medians_intermediate_plots_within(pval_summary_within)
```


## Median test, how uniform are predicted count medians for each setting when comparing predictions for different slides 
## number of p-values <=0.05 ("significant") / total number of sets compared for each combination of settings + CORRESPONDING PLOTS

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

#########Actual summary plot
pval_summary_within$comp <- paste(pval_summary_within$X1, "//VS//", pval_summary_within$X2)

pval_summary_within$median_signif <- "p-value > 0.05"
pval_summary_within$median_signif[pval_summary_within$Median_test_p_value <= 0.05] <- "p-value <= 0.05"

median_summaries <- data.frame("subset" = unique(pval_summary_within$subset), "p_val_signif" = NA, "p_val_Insignif" = NA, "significance_norm" = NA )
subset_split <- str_split(median_summaries$subset,  " ", simplify=TRUE)
median_summaries$ploidy <- subset_split[,1]
median_summaries$sp <- subset_split[,2]
median_summaries$reg_across <- subset_split[,5]
median_summaries$clustering_setting <- paste(subset_split[,1], subset_split[,3], subset_split[,4])

for (i in unique(pval_summary_within$subset)) {

  df <- pval_summary_within[pval_summary_within$subset == i, ]  

  median_summaries$p_val_Insignif[median_summaries$subset ==i] <- nrow(df[df$median_signif == "p-value > 0.05",])
  median_summaries$p_val_signif[median_summaries$subset ==i] <- nrow(df[df$median_signif == "p-value <= 0.05",])
  median_summaries$significance_norm[median_summaries$subset ==i] <- nrow(df[df$median_signif == "p-value <= 0.05",])/nrow(df)
}
 

symmetry <- median_summaries

ggplot(rbind(median_summaries, symmetry), mapping=aes(clustering_setting, sp, fill = as.numeric(significance_norm )) ) + 
  geom_tile( alpha = 0.8)+ 
   geom_text( aes(label=round(significance_norm, digits = 3)), size = 2 )+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = hcl.colors(20, "Cyan-Magenta"))+
  theme_classic()+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+ggtitle(paste("Median test, p-value <=0.05/total number of slides+species compared"))+
  facet_grid(~reg_across)

testpval_MEDIAN_summary <- data.frame("metrics" = "Median test, p-value <=0.05/total number of slides+species compared",
                       "suns_for_clust" = paste(median_summaries$clustering_setting, median_summaries$reg_across),
                        "sp" = median_summaries$sp,
                         "metrics_value" = median_summaries$significance_norm )
 
datatable(testpval_MEDIAN_summary)
```

supporting slide-by-slide plots, uncomment if really interested
```{r, include=FALSE}

pval_summary_within$comp <- paste(pval_summary_within$X1, "//VS//", pval_summary_within$X2)
pval_summary_within$median_signif <- "p-value > 0.05"
pval_summary_within$median_signif[pval_summary_within$Median_test_p_value <= 0.05] <- "p-value <= 0.05"

for (i in unique(pval_summary_within$subset)) {
  
  df <- pval_summary_within[pval_summary_within$subset ==i, ]
  
  gg <-  ggplot(df, aes(X1, X2, fill = as.numeric(Median_D )) ) +  geom_tile( alpha = 0.8)+ 
   geom_text( aes(label=round(Median_test_p_value, digits = 3), colour = as.factor(median_signif)) )+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = hcl.colors(20, "Cyan-Magenta"))+
  theme_classic()+ theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank())+ggtitle(paste("Median test", i))
  print(gg)
}  
########

```


## KS test, how uniform are predicted count distributions for each setting when comparing predictions for different slides 
## number of p-values <=0.05 ("significant") / total number of sets compared for each combination of settings  + CORRESPONDING PLOTS

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}


#########Actual summary plot
pval_summary_within$comp <- paste(pval_summary_within$X1, "//VS//", pval_summary_within$X2)

pval_summary_within$ks_signif <- "p-value > 0.05"
pval_summary_within$ks_signif[pval_summary_within$p.value <= 0.05] <- "p-value <= 0.05"

ks_summaries <- data.frame("subset" = unique(pval_summary_within$subset), "p_val_signif" = NA, "p_val_Insignif" = NA, "significance_norm" = NA )
subset_split <- str_split(ks_summaries$subset,  " ", simplify=TRUE)

ks_summaries$ploidy <- subset_split[,1]
ks_summaries$sp <- subset_split[,2]
ks_summaries$reg_across <- subset_split[,5]
ks_summaries$clustering_setting <- paste(subset_split[,1], subset_split[,3], subset_split[,4])

for (i in unique(pval_summary_within$subset)) {

  df <- pval_summary_within[pval_summary_within$subset == i, ]  

  ks_summaries$p_val_Insignif[ks_summaries$subset ==i] <- nrow(df[df$ks_signif == "p-value > 0.05",])
  ks_summaries$p_val_signif[ks_summaries$subset ==i] <- nrow(df[df$ks_signif == "p-value <= 0.05",])
  ks_summaries$significance_norm[ks_summaries$subset ==i] <- nrow(df[df$ks_signif == "p-value <= 0.05",])/nrow(df)
}
 

symmetry <- ks_summaries

ggplot(rbind(ks_summaries, symmetry), mapping=aes(clustering_setting, sp, fill = as.numeric(significance_norm )) ) + 
  geom_tile( alpha = 0.8)+ 
   geom_text( aes(label=round(significance_norm, digits = 3)), size =2 )+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = hcl.colors(20, "Cyan-Magenta"))+
  theme_classic()+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+ggtitle(paste("KS test, p-value <=0.05/total number of slides+species compared"))+
  facet_grid(~reg_across)
 
testpval_KS_summary <- data.frame("metrics" = "KS test, p-value <=0.05/total number of slides+species compared",
                       "suns_for_clust" = paste(ks_summaries$clustering_setting, ks_summaries$reg_across),
                        "sp" = ks_summaries$sp,
                         "metrics_value" = ks_summaries$significance_norm )
 
datatable(testpval_KS_summary)

```


 supporting slide-by-slide plots, uncomment if really interested
```{r, include=FALSE}
pval_summary_within$comp <- paste(pval_summary_within$X1, "//VS//", pval_summary_within$X2)
pval_summary_within$ks_signif <- "p-value > 0.05"
pval_summary_within$ks_signif[pval_summary_within$p.value <= 0.05] <- "p-value <= 0.05"

for (i in unique(pval_summary_within$subset)) {
  
  df <- pval_summary_within[pval_summary_within$subset ==i, ]
  
  gg <-  ggplot(df, aes(X1, X2, fill = as.numeric(Median_D )) ) +  geom_tile( alpha = 0.8)+ 
   geom_text( aes(label=round(p.value, digits = 3), colour = as.factor(ks_signif)) )+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = hcl.colors(20, "Cyan-Magenta"))+
  theme_classic()+ theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.text.y = element_blank())+ggtitle(paste("Median test", i))
  print(gg)
}  
########
```



## Comparing 95% Confidence Intervals of predictions
## Mean(Highest possible predicted bp_exp - Lowest possible predicted bp_exp)

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

CI_summary <- data.frame()

for(sp in unique(toplot$sp)){

  df <- toplot[toplot$sp == sp,]
  
  actual_pos <- unique(df$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df$validation == "ACTUAL"])
  df1 <- df[df$if_test_sp=="TEST_bootstrap",]

  #df1$for_medians <- paste(df1$suns_for_clust, df1$slidedate)
  df1 <- df1[ which(is.na(df1$bp_exp_ploidy_corr) == FALSE), ]
  
  for (setting in unique(df1$suns_for_clust)) {
   df3 <- df1[df1$suns_for_clust == setting,]
  # diff_big <- c()
  for (ploidy in unique(df3$ploidy_clust)) {
    
    df2 <- df3[df3$ploidy_clust == ploidy,]
    
    mean <- mean(as.numeric(df2$higher)-as.numeric(df2$lower) , na.rm = TRUE)
    med <- median( c(as.numeric(df2$higher), as.numeric(df2$lower)) , na.rm = TRUE)
    
      if (ploidy == "1n") { 
      diff_norm <- mean/min(actual_pos) } else 
    if (ploidy == "2n") { 
      diff_norm <- mean/max(actual_pos) } else 
    if (ploidy == "Undefined") {
    if (med < min(actual_pos)) {
      diff_norm <-  mean/min(actual_pos) } 
    else if(med > max(actual_pos)){
      diff <- med - max(actual_pos)  
      diff_norm <- (mean - max(actual_pos))/max(actual_pos) }
    else if(med > min(actual_pos) & med < max(actual_pos)) {
      diff <- mean( abs(min(actual_pos) - mean), abs(mean - max(actual_pos)) )
      diff_norm <- mean( abs(min(actual_pos) - mean), abs(mean - max(actual_pos)) )/mean((min(actual_pos)),(max(actual_pos))) } 
    }
    

    
   #diff_big <- c(diff_big, diff_norm)
    
    #for debug
    # print(paste(setting, sp, ploidy))
    # print(as.numeric(df2$higher)-as.numeric(df2$lower))
    
   tmp <-   data.frame("metrics" = "CI = mean(upper-lower)/bp_exp",
                       "suns_for_clust" = paste(ploidy, setting),
                        "sp" = sp,
                         "metrics_value" = diff_norm )
   CI_summary <- rbind(CI_summary, tmp)
 } }
}



datatable(CI_summary)
```

## corresponding plots ---- Comparing 95% Confidence Intervals of predictions
## Mean(Highest possible predicted bp_exp - Lowest possible predicted bp_exp)

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gg <- ggplot(toplot, aes( bp_exp_ploidy_corr,nucl_sum_int, colour = sp,) )+geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = as.numeric(lower), xmax =  as.numeric(higher)),  alpha = 0.1, size=0.05, linewidth=2)+
     theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust)+ 
     scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2", labels = scales::math_format(2^.x, format = log2))+
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log2", labels = scales::math_format(2^.x, format = log2), breaks = 2^(19:40))+
   #scale_shape_manual(values=c())+
     ggtitle("CI full")
  
print(gg)


#gg <- ggplot(toplot, aes( bp_exp_ploidy_corr,nucl_sum_int) )+geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = as.numeric(lower), xmax =  as.numeric(higher)),  alpha = 0.2, size=0.05, linewidth=1)+
#     theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust+sp, scales = "free_x", ncol= length(unique(toplot$sp)))+ 
#     scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2", labels = scales::math_format(2^.x, format = log2))+
#  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log2", labels = scales::math_format(2^.x, format = log2), breaks = 2^(19:40))+
   #scale_shape_manual(values=c())+
#     ggtitle("Ci full")
  
#print(gg)
#ggsave("CI_values_all_Quantile_bootstr.pdf", gg, width = 15, height =15)

toplot$CI_diff <- as.numeric(toplot$higher) - as.numeric(toplot$lower)
toplot$CI_diff <- log2( as.numeric(toplot$higher) ) - log2(  as.numeric(toplot$lower) )

gg <- ggplot(toplot, aes( suns_for_clust, CI_diff) )+
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.2)+
  geom_point(size =0.3, alpha = 0.3, position=position_jitter(height=0, width=0.2))+
     theme_bw()+facet_wrap(~sp, scales = "free_x", ncol= length(unique(toplot$sp)))+ 
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "log2", labels = scales::math_format(2^.x, format = log2))+
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
     ggtitle("log2(higher predicted estimate) - log2(lower predicted estimate) !! ON logarithmic scale in addition")
  
print(gg)
#ggsave("deltas_of_CI_values_all_Quantile_bootstr.pdf", gg, width = 10, height =5)

```


## Uniformity of slopes (=coefficients) WITHIN settings for each regression_clustering setting 
## number of p-values <=0.05 ("significant") / total number of sets compared for each setting, (!!!) between different species (!!!) + CORRESPONDING PLOTS (1 set = same species predicted across X slides)
### Anova+Tukey for differences between coefficients between different species, WITHIN 1 clustering setting   

## How consistent is the coefficient of every setting depending on species+ CORRESPONDING PLOTS


```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

subs <- toplot[!duplicated(toplot$bootstrap_setting), ]

subs$species_out <- str_replace(subs$bootstrap_setting, " .*", "")

coef_within <- anova_coef_within(subs)

coef_within$tuk_signif <- "p-value > 0.05"
coef_within$tuk_signif[coef_within$p.adj <= 0.05] <- "p-value <= 0.05"

ggplot(coef_within, aes(p.adj, comb, colour =comb, size = diff*10))+geom_point(alpha =0.5)+
  facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust)+theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank())+geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, colour = "red")+
  ggtitle("p-values for Anova of quantile regression coefficients")


coeff_summary <- data.frame("metrics" = NA,
                               "suns_for_clust" = NA,
                               "sp" = NA,
                               "metrics_value" = NA)



  for (setting in unique(coef_within$suns_for_clust)) {
  df2 <- coef_within[coef_within$suns_for_clust == setting,]
    
  diff_big <- nrow(df2[df2$tuk_signif == "p-value <= 0.05",])/nrow(df2)
    
   tmp <-   data.frame("metrics" = "number of p-values <=0.05 / total number of sets compared (1 set = same species predicted across X slides)",
                       "suns_for_clust" = setting,
                        "sp" = "ALL",
                         "metrics_value" = diff_big )
   coeff_summary <- rbind(coeff_summary, tmp)
  }


datatable(coeff_summary)

```






## making a dataframe for summarising how good is every regression

```{r}

goodness_summary <- na.omit(rbind(Pred_bp_delta_summary, MEDIAN_summary, testpval_MEDIAN_summary, testpval_KS_summary, CI_summary, coeff_summary))

goodness_summary_R <- reshape(goodness_summary,
                   idvar = c("metrics", "suns_for_clust"),
                   timevar = "sp",
                   direction = "wide")
fwrite(goodness_summary_R, "goodness_summary_R.csv")


datatable(goodness_summary_R)
```




# THE EXTENT OF DIFFERENCES BETWEEN DIFFERENT METHODS

## KS and median tests comparing predicted counts for each slide BETWEEN different regressions

## "How different are different regression methods?"

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#
pval_summary <- ks_medians_estimator_between(toplot)

```

GENERATING INTERMEDIATE PLOTS - uncomment content of chunk below upon need

```{r,include=FALSE}
#ks_medians_intermediate_plots_within(pval_summary_within)
```




## Median test Between settings for each slide 
##number of p-values \<=0.05 ("significant") / total number of sets compared for each combination of settings  + CORRESPONDING PLOTS

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

#########Actual summary plot
pval_summary$comp <- paste(pval_summary$X1, "//VS//", pval_summary$X2)

pval_summary$median_signif <- "p-value > 0.05"
pval_summary$median_signif[pval_summary$Median_test_p_value <= 0.05] <- "p-value <= 0.05"

median_summaries <- data.frame("comp"=unique(pval_summary$comp), "X1"=NA, "X2"=NA, "p_val_signif" = NA, "p_val_Insignif" = NA, "significance_norm" = NA )
median_summaries$X1 <- str_split(median_summaries$comp,  " //VS// ", simplify=TRUE)[,1]
median_summaries$X2 <- str_split(median_summaries$comp,  " //VS// ", simplify=TRUE)[,2]

for (i in unique(pval_summary$comp)) {
 print(i)
  df <- pval_summary[pval_summary$comp == i, ]  

  median_summaries$p_val_Insignif[median_summaries$comp ==i] <- nrow(df[df$median_signif == "p-value > 0.05",])
  median_summaries$p_val_signif[median_summaries$comp ==i] <- nrow(df[df$median_signif == "p-value <= 0.05",])
  median_summaries$significance_norm[median_summaries$comp ==i] <- nrow(df[df$median_signif == "p-value <= 0.05",])/nrow(df)
}
 

symmetry <- median_summaries
symmetry$X1 <- median_summaries$X2
symmetry$X2 <- median_summaries$X1

ggplot(rbind(median_summaries, symmetry), aes(X1, X2, fill = as.numeric(significance_norm )) ) +  geom_tile( alpha = 0.8)+ 
   geom_text( aes(label=round(significance_norm, digits = 3)), size =2 )+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = hcl.colors(20, "Cyan-Magenta"))+
  theme_classic()+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+ggtitle(paste("Median test, p-value <=0.05/total number of slides+species compared"))
  


testpval_between_MEDIAN_summary <- data.frame("metrics" = "Median test, p-value <=0.05/total number of slides+species compared",
                       "suns_for_clust_1" = median_summaries$X1,
                        "suns_for_clust_2" = median_summaries$X2,
                         "metrics_value" = median_summaries$significance_norm )
 
datatable(testpval_between_MEDIAN_summary)
 
```

supporting slide-by-slide plots, uncomment if really interested

```{r, include=FALSE}

pval_summary$comp <- paste(pval_summary$X1, "//VS//", pval_summary$X2)
pval_summary$median_signif <- "p-value > 0.05"
pval_summary$median_signif[pval_summary$Median_test_p_value <= 0.05] <- "p-value <= 0.05"

for (i in unique(pval_summary$subset)) {
  
  df <- pval_summary[pval_summary$subset ==i, ]
  
  gg <-  ggplot(df, aes(X1, X2, fill = as.numeric(Median_D )) ) +  geom_tile( alpha = 0.8)+ 
   geom_text( aes(label=round(Median_test_p_value, digits = 3), colour = as.factor(median_signif)) )+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = hcl.colors(20, "Cyan-Magenta"))+
  theme_classic()+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+ggtitle(paste("Median test", i))
  print(gg)
}  
########
```



##More general summary plots for KS test Between settings for each slide ##number of p-values \<=0.05 ("significant") / total number of sets compared for each combination of settings

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

########

#########Actual summary plot
pval_summary$comp <- paste(pval_summary$X1, "//VS//", pval_summary$X2)

pval_summary$ks_signif <- "p-value > 0.05"
pval_summary$ks_signif[pval_summary$p.value <= 0.05] <- "p-value <= 0.05"

ks_summaries <- data.frame("comp"=unique(pval_summary$comp), "X1"=NA, "X2"=NA, "p_val_signif" = NA, "p_val_Insignif" = NA, "significance_norm" = NA )
ks_summaries$X1 <- str_split(ks_summaries$comp,  " //VS// ", simplify=TRUE)[,1]
ks_summaries$X2 <- str_split(ks_summaries$comp,  " //VS// ", simplify=TRUE)[,2]

for (i in unique(pval_summary$comp)) {
 print(i)
  df <- pval_summary[pval_summary$comp == i, ]  

  ks_summaries$p_val_Insignif[ks_summaries$comp ==i] <- nrow(df[df$ks_signif == "p-value > 0.05",])
  ks_summaries$p_val_signif[ks_summaries$comp ==i] <- nrow(df[df$ks_signif == "p-value <= 0.05",])
  ks_summaries$significance_norm[ks_summaries$comp ==i] <- nrow(df[df$ks_signif == "p-value <= 0.05",])/nrow(df)
}
 

symmetry <- ks_summaries
symmetry$X1 <- ks_summaries$X2
symmetry$X2 <- ks_summaries$X1

ggplot(rbind(ks_summaries, symmetry), aes(X1, X2, fill = as.numeric(significance_norm )) ) +  geom_tile( alpha = 0.8)+ 
   geom_text( aes(label=round(significance_norm, digits = 3)), size =3 )+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = hcl.colors(20, "Cyan-Magenta"))+
  theme_classic()+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+ggtitle(paste("KS test, p-value <=0.05/total number of slides+species compared"))
  
testpval_between_KS_summary <- data.frame("metrics" = "KS test, p-value <=0.05/total number of slides+species compared",
                       "suns_for_clust_1" = ks_summaries$X1,
                        "suns_for_clust_2" = ks_summaries$X2,
                         "metrics_value" = ks_summaries$significance_norm )
 
datatable(testpval_between_KS_summary)
 
```

supporting slide-by-slide plots, uncomment if really interested

```{r,include=FALSE}
pval_summary$comp <- paste(pval_summary$X1, "//VS//", pval_summary$X2)

pval_summary$ks_signif <- "p-value > 0.05"
pval_summary$ks_signif[pval_summary$p.value <= 0.05] <- "p-value <= 0.05"

for (i in unique(pval_summary$subset)) {
  
  df <- pval_summary[pval_summary$subset ==i, ]
  
  gg <-  ggplot(df, aes(X1, X2, fill = as.numeric(statistic)) ) +  geom_tile( alpha = 0.8)+ 
   geom_text( aes(label=round(p.value, digits = 3), colour = as.factor(ks_signif)) )+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = hcl.colors(20, "Cyan-Magenta"))+
  theme_classic()+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+ggtitle(paste("KS test", i))
  print(gg)
}  
```





## Coefficients between regressions

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

coef_between <- anova_coef_between(subs)

coef_between$tuk_signif <- "p-value > 0.05"
coef_between$tuk_signif[coef_between$p.adj <= 0.05] <- "p-value <= 0.05"


#########Actual summary plot

anova_summaries <- data.frame("subset" = unique(coef_between$comb), "p_val_signif" = NA, "p_val_Insignif" = NA, "significance_norm" = NA )
subset_split <- str_split(anova_summaries$subset,  "-", simplify=TRUE)
anova_summaries$X1 <- subset_split[,1]
anova_summaries$X2 <- subset_split[,2]

for (i in unique(coef_between$comb)) {

  df <- coef_between[coef_between$comb == i, ]  

  anova_summaries$p_val_Insignif[anova_summaries$subset ==i] <- nrow(df[df$tuk_signif == "p-value > 0.05",])
  anova_summaries$p_val_signif[anova_summaries$subset ==i] <- nrow(df[df$tuk_signif == "p-value <= 0.05",])
  anova_summaries$significance_norm[anova_summaries$subset ==i] <- nrow(df[df$tuk_signif == "p-value <= 0.05",])/nrow(df)
}
 

symmetry <- anova_summaries

ggplot(rbind(anova_summaries, symmetry), mapping=aes(X1, X2, fill = as.numeric(significance_norm )) ) + 
  geom_tile( alpha = 0.8)+ 
   geom_text( aes(label=round(significance_norm, digits = 3)), size =3 )+ 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors = hcl.colors(20, "Cyan-Magenta"))+
  theme_classic()+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+ggtitle(paste("p-values for Anova of quantile regression coefficients"))

testpval_between_coef_summary <- data.frame("metrics" = "Anova on coefficients(slopes), p-value <=0.05/total number of slides+species compared",
                       "suns_for_clust_1" = anova_summaries$X1,
                        "suns_for_clust_2" = anova_summaries$X2,
                         "metrics_value" = anova_summaries$significance_norm )
 
datatable(testpval_between_coef_summary)
 

```



## making a dataframe for summarising how regressions differ between each other

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

difference_summary <- na.omit(rbind(testpval_between_MEDIAN_summary, testpval_between_KS_summary, testpval_between_coef_summary))

#difference_summary_R <- reshape(difference_summary, idvar = c("metrics", "suns_for_clust_1"),timevar = "suns_for_clust_2",  direction = "wide")
fwrite(difference_summary, "difference_summary.csv")

datatable(difference_summary)

```













# Testing if the difference between predicted medians for n and 1n ~2.

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ploidy_ratios_MEAN_summary <- data.frame()

ploidy_ratios <- data_frame()

for(sp in unique(toplot$sp)){
  
  df <- toplot[toplot$sp == sp,]
  # actual_pos <- unique(df$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df$validation == "ACTUAL"])
  
  df1 <- df[df$if_test_sp=="TEST_bootstrap",]
  #df1$for_medians <- paste(df1$suns_for_clust, df1$slidedate)
  df1 <- df1[ which(is.na(df1$bp_exp_ploidy_corr) == FALSE), ]
  
  for (setting in unique(df1$suns_for_clust)) {
    df3 <- df1[df1$suns_for_clust == setting,]
    vect_med2nvs1n <- c()
  for (i in unique(df3$slidedate)) {
    
    #if (nrow(df3[df3$slidedate==i,]) == 0 ) next 
    df2 <- df3[df3$slidedate==i, ]
    
    n1_med <- median(df2$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df2$ploidy_clust== "1n"])
    n2_med <- median(df2$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df2$ploidy_clust== "2n"])
    
    if (length(n1_med) ==0 | length(n2_med) == 0) next
    
    med2nvs1n <- n2_med/n1_med
    
    vect_med2nvs1n <- c(vect_med2nvs1n, med2nvs1n)
    
    tmp1 <-   data.frame("suns_for_clust" = setting,
                         "slidedate" = i,
                        "sp" = sp,
                         "metrics_value" = med2nvs1n)
    
    ploidy_ratios <- rbind(ploidy_ratios, tmp1)
  }
   tmp <-   data.frame("metrics" = "mean(median of 1n cells/ median of 2n cells)",
                       "suns_for_clust" = setting,
                        "sp" = sp,
                         "metrics_value" = mean(vect_med2nvs1n))
                       
   ploidy_ratios_MEAN_summary <- rbind(MEDIAN_summary, tmp)
  } 
}


```



```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ploidy_ratios[ which(ploidy_ratios$metrics_value < -10 | ploidy_ratios$metrics_value > 10) , ]

gg <- ggplot(ploidy_ratios, aes( slidedate, metrics_value, colour=sp) )+geom_point()+
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust, scales="free")+theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 2, color = "red")+
  ggtitle("Median of 2n/Median of 1n cells for each slide, unfiltered")

print(gg)

# ploidy_ratios$exp_series_date <- str_split(ploidy_ratios$slidedate, " ", simplify = T )[ ,2]


```


```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ploidy_ratios_filt <- ploidy_ratios[ -which(ploidy_ratios$metrics_value < -0 | ploidy_ratios$metrics_value > 3) , ]

gg <- ggplot(ploidy_ratios_filt, aes( slidedate, metrics_value, colour=sp) )+geom_point()+
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust, scales="free")+theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 2, color = "red")+
  ggtitle("Median of 2n/Median of 1n cells for each slide, filtered")

print(gg)

# ploidy_ratios$exp_series_date <- str_split(ploidy_ratios$slidedate, " ", simplify = T )[ ,2]


```

### same as above, but for ratio of medians for sets of cells in exp_series_date and all spesies


```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ploidy_ratios_exp_series <- data_frame()

for(sp in unique(toplot$sp)){
  
  df <- toplot[toplot$sp == sp,]
  # actual_pos <- unique(df$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df$validation == "ACTUAL"])
  
  df1 <- df[df$if_test_sp=="TEST_bootstrap",]
  #df1$for_medians <- paste(df1$suns_for_clust, df1$slidedate)
  df1 <- df1[ which(is.na(df1$bp_exp_ploidy_corr) == FALSE), ]
  
  for (setting in unique(df1$suns_for_clust)) {
    df3 <- df1[df1$suns_for_clust == setting,]
    vect_med2nvs1n <- c()
  for (i in unique(df3$exp_series_date)) {
    
    #if (nrow(df3[df3$slidedate==i,]) == 0 ) next 
    df2 <- df3[df3$exp_series_date==i, ]
    
    n1_med <- median(df2$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df2$ploidy_clust== "1n"])
    n2_med <- median(df2$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df2$ploidy_clust== "2n"])
    
    if (length(n1_med) ==0 | length(n2_med) == 0) next
    
    med2nvs1n <- n2_med/n1_med
    
    tmp1 <-   data.frame("suns_for_clust" = setting,
                         "exp_series_date" = i,
                        "sp" = sp,
                         "metrics_value" = med2nvs1n)
    
    ploidy_ratios_exp_series <- rbind(ploidy_ratios_exp_series, tmp1)
  }

  } 
}

ploidy_ratios_exp_series[ which(ploidy_ratios_exp_series$metrics_value < -10 | ploidy_ratios_exp_series$metrics_value > 10) , ]

gg <- ggplot(ploidy_ratios_exp_series, aes( as.factor(exp_series_date) , metrics_value, colour=sp) )+geom_point()+
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust, scales="free")+theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 2, color = "red")+
  ggtitle("Median of 2n/Median of 1n cells for each experimental series date")

print(gg)



ploidy_ratios_est_sp <- data_frame()

for(sp in unique(toplot$sp)){
  
  df <- toplot[toplot$sp == sp,]
  # actual_pos <- unique(df$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df$validation == "ACTUAL"])
  
  df1 <- df[df$if_test_sp=="TEST_bootstrap",]
  #df1$for_medians <- paste(df1$suns_for_clust, df1$slidedate)
  df1 <- df1[ which(is.na(df1$bp_exp_ploidy_corr) == FALSE), ]
  
  for (setting in unique(df1$suns_for_clust)) {
    df3 <- df1[df1$suns_for_clust == setting,]
    vect_med2nvs1n <- c()

    #if (nrow(df3[df3$slidedate==i,]) == 0 ) next 
    df2 <- df3#[df3$exp_series_date==i, ]
    
    n1_med <- median(df2$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df2$ploidy_clust== "1n"])
    n2_med <- median(df2$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df2$ploidy_clust== "2n"])
    
    if (length(n1_med) ==0 | length(n2_med) == 0) next
    
    med2nvs1n <- n2_med/n1_med
    
    tmp1 <-   data.frame("suns_for_clust" = setting,
                         "exp_series_date" = i,
                        "sp" = sp,
                         "metrics_value" = med2nvs1n)
    
    ploidy_ratios_est_sp <- rbind(ploidy_ratios_est_sp, tmp1)
 
  } 
}


gg <- ggplot(ploidy_ratios_est_sp, aes( sp , metrics_value, colour=sp) )+geom_point()+
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust, scales="free")+theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 2, color = "red")+
  ggtitle("Median of 2n/Median of 1n cells for each species (all series, all slides)")

print(gg)


```














# Accuracy of predictions depending on the number of datapoints( = measured cells) used for estimating regression fit 
!!! Warning !!!(the size of the dataset for clusterisation is not considered here)

## For the test species, medians

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#toplot <- toplot[toplot$pvalue <= 0.05,]

test_cellcount_medians <- data.frame()

for(sp in unique(toplot$sp)){
  
  df <- toplot[toplot$sp == sp,]
  actual_pos <- unique(df$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df$validation == "ACTUAL"])
  
  df1 <- df[df$if_test_sp=="TEST_bootstrap",]
  #df1$for_medians <- paste(df1$suns_for_clust, df1$slidedate)
  df1 <- df1[ which(is.na(df1$bp_exp_ploidy_corr) == FALSE), ]
  
  for (setting in unique(df1$suns_for_clust)) {
  for (ploidy in unique(df1$ploidy_clust)) {
    df2 <- df1[df1$suns_for_clust == setting,]
    df2 <- df2[df2$ploidy_clust == ploidy,]
    
  for (i in unique(df2$slidedate)) {
    med <- median(df2$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df2$slidedate==i])
  
    if (ploidy == "1n") { 
      diff <- min(actual_pos) - med 
      diff_norm <-(min(actual_pos) - med)/min(actual_pos) } else 
    if (ploidy == "2n") { 
      diff <- med - max(actual_pos) 
      diff_norm <- (med - max(actual_pos))/max(actual_pos) } else 
    if (ploidy == "Undefined") {
    if (med < min(actual_pos)) {
      diff <-  min(actual_pos) - med 
      diff_norm <-  (min(actual_pos) - med)/min(actual_pos) } 
    else if(med > max(actual_pos)){
      diff <- med - max(actual_pos)  
      diff_norm <- (med - max(actual_pos))/max(actual_pos) }
    else if(med > min(actual_pos) & med < max(actual_pos)) {
      diff <- mean( abs(min(actual_pos) - med), abs(med - max(actual_pos)) )
      diff_norm <- mean( abs(min(actual_pos) - med), abs(med - max(actual_pos)) )/mean((min(actual_pos)),(max(actual_pos)) ) } 
          }
    
    if ( str_split(unique(df2$suns_for_clust), " ", simplify = T )[3] == "slide" ) {
      test_cellcount <- length(unique(df2$cell_coord[df2$slidedate==i]))  }
    else if ( str_split(unique(df2$suns_for_clust), " ", simplify = T )[3] == "series" ) {
      series_date <- str_split(i, " ", simplify = T )[2] 
      test_cellcount <- length(unique(df2$cell_coord[df2$exp_series_date==series_date])) }
    #debug
    #print(i)
    #print(setting)
    #print(sp)
    #print(test_cellcount)
   PERSLIDEtest_cellcount <- length(unique(df2$cell_coord[df2$slidedate==i]))
   mean_CI <- as.numeric(df2$higher[df2$slidedate==i]) - as.numeric(df2$lower[df2$slidedate==i])
   mean_CI_norm <- as.numeric(df2$higher[df2$slidedate==i])/as.numeric(df2$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df2$slidedate==i]) - as.numeric(df2$lower[df2$slidedate==i])/as.numeric(df2$bp_exp_ploidy_corr[df2$slidedate==i])
   
   tmp <-   data.frame("metrics" = "Mean(|Predicted medians - expected_bp|)/bp_exp",
                      "suns_for_clust" = setting,
                      "sp" = sp,
                      "slidedate" = i, 
                      "test_cellcount" = test_cellcount,
                      "PERSLIDEtest_cellcount" = PERSLIDEtest_cellcount,
                      "pred_med_vs_act" = diff, 
                      "pred_med_vs_act_norm" = diff_norm,
                      "mean_CI" = mean(mean_CI),
                      "mean_CI_norm" = mean(mean_CI_norm),
                      "bootstrap_setting" = unique(df2$bootstrap_setting) #paste(sp, setting, i)
                      )
   test_cellcount_medians <- rbind(test_cellcount_medians, tmp) 
  }
  } }
}



```


### corresponding plots.
Number of cells PER SINGLE SLIDE is plotted - as, so far, we estimate separate median for each slide measured for kinetoplastid. Can be changed to the total number of species within a given slide OR series - depending how regression was inferred - for this, change PERSLIDEtest_cellcount ==> test_cellcount

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gg <- ggplot(na.omit(test_cellcount_medians), aes( mean_CI_norm, PERSLIDEtest_cellcount, colour=sp) )+geom_point()+
  theme_bw()+scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2")+
  facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust, scales="free")+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
  ggtitle("CI (upper-lower)/bp_exp_ploidy_corr VS test species cells per 1 slide(!)")

print(gg)


gg <- ggplot(na.omit(test_cellcount_medians), aes( abs(pred_med_vs_act_norm), PERSLIDEtest_cellcount, colour=sp) )+
  geom_point()+
 #geom_line(aes(group = sp, colour=sp))+
  theme_bw()+#scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2", labels = scales::math_format(2^.x, format = log2))+
  facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust, scales="free")+
  ggtitle("(Median pred - median exp)/median_exp VS test species cells - per 1 slide(!)")

print(gg)

```

### For the particular regression+clustering method (which was selected for further kinetoplastid estimates)

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gg <- ggplot(na.omit(test_cellcount_medians[test_cellcount_medians$suns_for_clust=="est_sp slidedate series",]), aes( mean_CI_norm, PERSLIDEtest_cellcount) )+
  geom_point(aes(colour=sp))+
  #geom_smooth(se = FALSE, method = lm)+
  theme_bw()+scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2")+
  facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust, scales="free")+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
  ggtitle("CI (upper-lower)/bp_exp_ploidy_corr VS test species cells per 1 slide(!)")

print(gg)


gg <- ggplot(na.omit(test_cellcount_medians[test_cellcount_medians$suns_for_clust=="est_sp slidedate series",]), aes( abs(pred_med_vs_act_norm), PERSLIDEtest_cellcount) )+
  geom_point(aes(colour=sp))+
  #geom_smooth(se = FALSE, method = lm, aes(colour=sp))+
  theme_bw()+#scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2", labels = scales::math_format(2^.x, format = log2))+
  facet_wrap(~suns_for_clust, scales="free")+
  ggtitle("(Median pred - median exp)/median_exp VS test species cells - per 1 slide(!)")

print(gg)

```



## For the control species count, how it affects predicted medians of test species

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

control_cellcount_medians <- data.frame()

for(BS in unique(toplot$bootstrap_setting)){
  
  df <- toplot[toplot$bootstrap_setting == BS,]
  df <- df[df$if_test_sp == "CONTROL_species",]
  #df1$for_medians <- paste(df1$suns_for_clust, df1$slidedate)
  df1 <- df[ which(is.na(df$bp_exp_ploidy_corr) == FALSE), ]
  
  for (setting in unique(df1$suns_for_clust)) {
    for (sp in unique(df1$sp)) {
      
    df2 <- df1[df1$suns_for_clust == setting,]
    df2 <- df2[df2$sp == sp,]
      
     for (i in unique(df2$slidedate)) {
       
       
    if ( str_split(unique(df2$suns_for_clust), " ", simplify = T )[3] == "slide" ) {
      control_cellcount <- length(unique(df2$cell_coord[df2$slidedate==i]))  }
    else if ( str_split(unique(df2$suns_for_clust), " ", simplify = T )[3] == "series" ) {
      series_date <- str_split(i, " ", simplify = T )[2] 
      control_cellcount <- length(unique(df2$cell_coord[df2$exp_series_date==series_date])) }
     }
    #debug
  #  print(i)
  #  print(setting)
  #  print(sp)
  #  print(control_cellcount)

    tmp <-   data.frame("suns_for_clust" = setting,
                      "control_sp" = sp,
                      "slidedate" = i, 
                      "control_cellcount" = control_cellcount, 
                      "bootstrap_setting"= BS #paste(sp, setting, i)
                        )

   control_cellcount_medians <- rbind(control_cellcount_medians, tmp) 

} } 
}



```


```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

test_control_cellcount <- left_join(test_cellcount_medians, control_cellcount_medians, by = "bootstrap_setting")

#debug
#unique(test_cellcount_medians$bootstrap_setting) %in% unique(control_cellcount_medians$bootstrap_setting)
#unique(control_cellcount_medians$control_cellcount)

old_names <- names(test_control_cellcount)
new_names <- sub("\\..*", "", old_names)
will_be_duplicated <- duplicated(new_names) | duplicated(new_names, fromLast = TRUE)
final_names <- ifelse(will_be_duplicated, old_names, new_names)
names(test_control_cellcount) <- final_names


test_control_cellcount <- test_control_cellcount[, colSums(!is.na(test_control_cellcount)) > 0]

colnames(test_control_cellcount)

test_control_cellcount <- test_control_cellcount[!duplicated(test_control_cellcount),]

test_control_cellcount <- test_control_cellcount[test_control_cellcount$suns_for_clust.x == test_control_cellcount$suns_for_clust.y,]

```


### corresponding plots.


```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
gg <- ggplot(na.omit(test_control_cellcount), aes( mean_CI_norm, control_cellcount, colour=suns_for_clust.x) )+
  geom_point(aes(size = test_cellcount), alpha = 0.2)+
  #geom_line()+
  theme_bw()+scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2")+
  facet_wrap(~control_sp+sp, scales="free")+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
  ggtitle("CI (upper-lower)/bp_exp_ploidy_corr VS control species cells per regression")

#print(gg)

ggsave("cellcount_CI_values_control_species.pdf", gg, width = 15, height =15)

gg <- ggplot(na.omit(test_control_cellcount), aes( pred_med_vs_act_norm, control_cellcount, colour=suns_for_clust.x) )+
  geom_point(aes(size = test_cellcount), alpha = 0.2)+
  #geom_line()+
  theme_bw()+scale_x_continuous(trans = "log2")+
  facet_wrap(~control_sp+sp, scales="free")+theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle =90))+
  ggtitle("(Median pred - median exp)/median_exp VS control species cells per regression")

#print(gg)

ggsave("cellcount_median_values_control_species.pdf", gg, width = 15, height =15)

```
